mapper.sql: id, invoice_id, invoice_no, poNo, poItemNo, order_no, model_no, qty, po_model_no, error_type, error_text, po_qty, pack_qty, remark, create_time, update_time, ignore_error, ignore_psn, ignore_time, ignore_reason, status, po_warehouse_code
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.imp_invoice_error
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.imp_invoice_error (id, invoice_id, invoice_no, poNo, poItemNo, order_no, model_no, qty, po_model_no, error_type, error_text, po_qty, pack_qty, remark, create_time, update_time, ignore_error, ignore_psn, ignore_time, ignore_reason, status, po_warehouse_code) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pono,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{poitemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{qty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{poModelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{errorType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{errorText,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{poQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{packQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{ignoreError,jdbcType=BIT}, #{ignorePsn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{ignoreTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{ignoreReason,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{poWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

update dbo.imp_invoice_error
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
invoice_id = #{record.invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
invoice_no = #{record.invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
poNo = #{record.pono,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
poItemNo = #{record.poitemno,jdbcType=INTEGER},
order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
qty = #{record.qty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
po_model_no = #{record.poModelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
error_type = #{record.errorType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
error_text = #{record.errorText,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
po_qty = #{record.poQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
pack_qty = #{record.packQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ignore_error = #{record.ignoreError,jdbcType=BIT},
ignore_psn = #{record.ignorePsn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
ignore_time = #{record.ignoreTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ignore_reason = #{record.ignoreReason,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
po_warehouse_code = #{record.poWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.imp_invoice_error set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, invoice_id = #{record.invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, invoice_no = #{record.invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, poNo = #{record.pono,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, poItemNo = #{record.poitemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, qty = #{record.qty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, po_model_no = #{record.poModelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, error_type = #{record.errorType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, error_text = #{record.errorText,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, po_qty = #{record.poQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, pack_qty = #{record.packQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ignore_error = #{record.ignoreError,jdbcType=BIT}, ignore_psn = #{record.ignorePsn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, ignore_time = #{record.ignoreTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ignore_reason = #{record.ignoreReason,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, status = #{record.status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, po_warehouse_code = #{record.poWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.imp_invoice_error
invoice_id = #{invoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
invoice_no = #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
poNo = #{pono,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
poItemNo = #{poitemno,jdbcType=INTEGER},
order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
qty = #{qty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
po_model_no = #{poModelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
error_type = #{errorType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
error_text = #{errorText,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
po_qty = #{poQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
pack_qty = #{packQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ignore_error = #{ignoreError,jdbcType=BIT},
ignore_psn = #{ignorePsn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
ignore_time = #{ignoreTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ignore_reason = #{ignoreReason,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
po_warehouse_code = #{poWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
